title: Energizing Brazilian Tofu Curry
description: A funky, juicy Brazilian-inspired tofu curry with massaman paste and a burst of yuzu citrus, perfect for meal-prep.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp coconut oil in a pan over medium heat and sauté diced onion until translucent.
Add minced garlic and stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in the massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute to release its flavors.
Pour in coconut milk and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add cubed tofu and mixed vegetables, then cook for 10 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Stir in yuzu juice, tamari, and brown rice, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes until the rice is cooked.
Turn off the heat and let the curry sit covered for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve the curry over cooked rice or quinoa, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
